description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with a youthful appearance, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She wears a fitted crop top with long sleeves, high-waisted pants, and tall, slouchy heeled boots. Her top features a high collar and a graphic design on the chest, while the sleeves are textured and contrast with the main body of the garment. The pants are sleek and form-fitting, complementing the overall modern, urban look. Her hair is long, wavy, and styled with two prominent buns on top, giving her a distinctive and playful appearance. The figure's facial features are soft and expressive, and she is not carrying any visible accessories or objects.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian in modern, fitted clothing with tall heeled boots and a playful double-bun hairstyle, standing upright and unencumbered.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, facial features, and the double-bun hairstyle clearly, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the wavy length of the hair, and the contour of the boots and clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hair, the fit of the pants, and the design of the boots from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair, and the side seam of the clothing and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted crop top with long sleeves, high-waisted pants, tall heeled boots
attribute_hairstyle: long wavy hair with two buns on top
